4. The item is furnished at the direction of the patient's physician or allowed 
practitioner and is specifically identified in the plan of care. 

All nonroutine supplies must be specifically ordered by the physician or allowed 
practitioner or the physician or allowed practitioner's order for services must require the 
use of the specific supplies to be effectively furnished. 

The charge for nonroutine supplies is excluded
